import zipfile
import re
import os

files = [
    r"C:\Users\33908\Desktop\AI大模型（AIGC）赋能企业创新.docx",
    r"C:\Users\33908\Desktop\交接文档.docx",
    r"C:\Users\33908\Desktop\演讲稿.docx",
    r"C:\Users\33908\Desktop\建筑AI课程.docx"
]

results = {}

for fp in files:
    try:
        name = os.path.basename(fp)
        exists = os.path.exists(fp)
        if not exists:
            results[name] = {"exists": False}
            continue
        with zipfile.ZipFile(fp, 'r') as z:
            with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
                content = f.read().decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')
                # Extract text from <w:t> tags
                texts = re.findall(r'<w:t[^>]*>([^<]+)</w:t>', content)
                full_text = ''.join(texts)
                # Get first 2000 chars
